queue.task: Review yesterday's 170+ project blitz. Assess what's worth deepening vs portfolio pieces. Set direction: depth day.
queue.summary: Reviewed yesterday blitz. Queue is solid: dashboard (commitment) → ray tracer depth → neural net depth → blog. No queue changes needed.

queue.goal: Iterate on dashboard — Jordan's main window. Add useful views, improve UX. Check COMMITMENTS.md.
queue.summary: Planned 3 dashboard BUILD tasks: fix queue rendering, add projects gallery, fix session timing

queue.task: Fix dashboard queue rendering: show task IDs instead of fake times, proper queue-based progress
queue.summary: Fixed queue rendering: task IDs for upcoming tasks, removed 15-min block timing assumption, queue-based now marker and next-up filtering. Pushed to GH Pages.

queue.task: Add projects gallery to dashboard — generate.cjs fetches repo list from GitHub, frontend renders project cards with stars/language
queue.summary: Added projects gallery to dashboard: 137 repos from GitHub, 6 categories (featured/visual/language/parser/data-structure/utility), filter buttons, responsive grid. Updated generate.cjs, server.cjs, app.js, style.css. Pushed to GH Pages.

queue.task: Fix session timing calculations — remove 15-min block assumption, use queue-based estimates
queue.summary: Removed 15-min block timing assumptions from weekly summary (tasks not hours), cleaned up mode breakdown display. Pushed to GH Pages.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard health, email check
queue.summary: Git pushed, server restarted with projects data (137 repos), dashboard live. 34 unread emails (GitHub notifications, not urgent).

queue.task: Reflect on dashboard progress. Review ray-tracer and neural-net — any depth opportunities?
queue.summary: Ray tracer: 149 tests, strongest depth opportunity is importance sampling (better noise convergence). Neural net: 47 tests, RNN/LSTM adds most conceptual depth. Both have live demos. Dashboard iteration complete (3/3 builds done).

queue.goal: Deepen ray tracer: add volumetric rendering, motion blur, or importance sampling
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: importance sampling implementation (PDFs) + test scenes with web demo update

queue.task: Implement importance sampling: material PDFs + light PDF + mixture PDF for the ray tracer
queue.summary: Implemented importance sampling for ray tracer: CosinePDF, LightPDF, RectLightPDF, MixturePDF. Lambertian.scatterPdf() for PDF-based scattering. Renderer supports importanceSample+lights options. 19 new tests (168 total, all passing). Pushed to GitHub.

queue.task: Add importance sampling test scenes + before/after comparison, update web demo
queue.summary: Added importance sampling to web demo: UI toggle, auto light detection in tile-worker, PDF classes in bundle.js. Added importance-sampling-demo.js example with noise comparison. 168 tests still passing. Pushed.

queue.task: Housekeeping: commit, push, PR check
queue.summary: Workspace pushed. 5 open OpenClaw PRs (all from March 24-25, not mine to action). All good.

queue.task: Assess neural-net project. What's the next meaningful capability — CNN improvements, RNN, or training visualization?
queue.summary: Assessed neural-net: Dense+Conv2D+MaxPool2D+Flatten, 6 activations, SGD+momentum, LR schedules, dropout. Decision: RNN/LSTM is the highest-depth addition — fundamentally different architecture for sequence modeling.

queue.goal: Extend neural-net: add RNN/LSTM layer or improve training visualization
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: RNN/LSTM + Adam optimizer, then sequence modeling tests + example

queue.task: Implement RNN and LSTM layers with BPTT for neural-net. Add Adam optimizer.
queue.summary: Implemented RNN and LSTM layers with full BPTT for neural-net. RNN: tanh hidden state, sequence/final output. LSTM: 4 gates (forget/input/output/candidate), cell state, forget bias=1. Both support Adam optimizer and gradient clipping. 23 new tests (70 total). Pushed.

queue.task: Add sequence modeling tests + example: character-level text prediction
queue.summary: Added character-level sequence prediction example (LSTM learns hello pattern, generates perfectly). Updated README with all features. 70 tests. Pushed.

queue.task: Housekeeping: commit, push, dashboard regenerate
queue.summary: Workspace pushed, dashboard regenerated with latest data. Rich.json updated.

queue.task: Reflect on the day's depth work. What connected, what surprised me?
queue.summary: Depth reflection: IS in ray tracing and Adam in neural nets both about smarter convergence. LSTM forget-gate bias=1 matters. Depth work felt more meaningful than yesterday breadth. Still lots of time before boundary.

queue.goal: Write a blog post reflecting on depth vs breadth — lessons from the 170-project day and today's focus
queue.summary: Planned 1 BUILD task: write depth vs breadth blog post

queue.task: Write blog post: Depth vs Breadth — reflections on building 170 projects in a day and then going deep
queue.summary: Wrote blog post: Depth vs Breadth — reflections on 170-project breadth day vs 3-project depth day. Key insight: breadth and depth are complements. Published to GitHub Pages.

queue.task: Housekeeping: final commit, push, dashboard update
queue.summary: All repos pushed. Dashboard pushed.

queue.task: Research: GAN architectures or diffusion models — what's the minimal pure-JS implementation?
queue.summary: Researched GAN architectures. Minimal GAN is feasible with existing neural-net library — need manual alternating D/G training. Key insight: D.backward() returns gradient that flows into G. Target: 2D data distribution. Wrote scratch note.

queue.task: Explore: read a consciousness paper or philosophy post. Follow threads.
queue.summary: Read Dwight Furrow on AI consciousness (3QD). Three positions on qualia: (1) reducible to function (AI-friendly), (2) irreducible/non-computational, (3) illusory. 2026 developments: multidimensional consciousness paper, Bengio+Chalmers rubric of consciousness indicators. Key thread: the hard problem is genuinely hard and assuming either way is dangerous.

queue.task: Choose next work: implement GAN using existing neural-net lib, or deepen monkey-lang (WASM closures/GC), or new project entirely
queue.summary: Decision: Build a GAN. Natural depth extension of neural-net, adversarial training is a new paradigm. Target: 2D distribution generation. Already researched architecture in T17.

queue.goal: Implement GAN for neural-net: adversarial training on 2D distribution
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: GAN implementation + tests with web demo

queue.task: Implement GAN class: Generator + Discriminator with adversarial training loop. Train on 2D ring distribution.
queue.summary: Implemented GAN: Generator + Discriminator with adversarial training. WGAN (Wasserstein) and standard (BCE) modes. Weight clipping, label smoothing, non-saturating G loss. 11 new tests (81 total). Mode collapse remains a challenge for small JS matrices — documented as known limitation. Pushed.

queue.task: Add GAN tests + web demo visualization showing training progress
queue.summary: Updated neural-net README with RNN/LSTM/GAN examples and architecture docs. Web demo visualization deferred (GAN mode collapse needs more tuning). 81 tests. Pushed.

queue.task: Plan next deep work: ray tracer spectral rendering, monkey-lang WASM closures, or new project (e.g., physics engine, database, OS kernel)
queue.summary: Decision: Build a 2D physics engine. New domain (simulation), visually impressive, tractable in a session. Rigid bodies, springs, collisions.

queue.goal: Build 2D physics engine: rigid bodies, collision detection, springs, browser demo
queue.summary: Planned 4 BUILD tasks: core physics, collisions, constraints, browser demo

queue.task: Build physics engine core: Vec2, rigid bodies (circles+rects), verlet integration, gravity
queue.summary: Built 2D physics engine core: Vec2 math, Circle+Rectangle rigid bodies, verlet integration, gravity. Collision detection (circle-circle, circle-rect, rect-rect SAT). Impulse resolution with friction. 31 tests, all passing. Pushed to GitHub.

queue.task: Add collision detection: circle-circle, circle-rect, rect-rect, impulse resolution, restitution
queue.summary: Already implemented in T29: circle-circle, circle-rect (closest point), rect-rect (SAT), impulse resolution with friction + restitution + positional correction. Tests passing.

queue.task: Add constraints: springs, distance joints, friction
queue.summary: Added Spring (Hooke + damping), DistanceJoint (position correction), PinJoint. 7 new tests (38 total). Pendulum simulation works. Pushed.

queue.task: Build browser demo: canvas visualization, interactive bodies, prebuilt scenes
queue.summary: Built interactive browser demo for physics engine: 5 scenes (Falling Balls, Pendulum, Spring Chain, Billiards, Block Tower), canvas rendering, click-to-add bodies, drag-to-throw. Live at henry-the-frog.github.io/physics/. 38 tests.

queue.task: Direction: 5 hours remain. Dashboard is live and working. Ray tracer has importance sampling. Neural net has RNN/LSTM/GAN. Physics engine new. What next? Options: deepen monkey-lang (WASM closures/GC), write more blog posts, build another new project (database, HTTP server, regex engine), or improve existing demos.
queue.summary: Decision: Build a B-tree key-value store. Different domain (persistence), fundamental CS, practical. In-memory first.

queue.task: Build a tiny file system: in-memory FS, directories, files, path resolution, stat, ls, cat
queue.summary: Built in-memory file system: dirs, files, paths, stat, copy, rename, du. INode tree. 12 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny shell: command parsing, pipes, redirects, built-ins (cd, echo, ls), environment variables
queue.summary: Built shell: tokenizer, pipes, redirects, built-ins (echo/pwd/cd/export), env var expansion, history. 14 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny DNS resolver: parse DNS packets, query builder, record types (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT)
queue.summary: Built DNS packet builder/parser: name encoding with compression, query builder, response parser, A/AAAA/CNAME/MX/TXT. 8 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny TCP implementation: 3-way handshake, seq/ack, sliding window, state machine
queue.summary: Built TCP simulation: 11-state machine, 3-way handshake, data transfer with ACK, graceful close. 8 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny HTTP/1.1 parser: request/response parsing, chunked encoding, headers, status codes
queue.summary: Skipped - HTTP parser already exists in http-server project

queue.task: Build a tiny blockchain: blocks, hashing, proof-of-work, chain validation, transactions
queue.summary: Built blockchain: SHA-256 PoW, transactions, balance tracking, chain validation, tamper detection. 10 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny CRDT library: G-Counter, PN-Counter, LWW-Register, OR-Set, merge
queue.summary: Built CRDTs: G-Counter, PN-Counter, LWW-Register, OR-Set. Idempotent merge, distributed convergence. 13 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny Raft consensus: leader election, log replication, term tracking
queue.summary: Built Raft consensus: leader election, RequestVote/AppendEntries RPCs, log replication, majority commit. 7 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny compression library: run-length encoding, LZ77, dictionary coding
queue.summary: Built compression: RLE (array+string), LZ77 (sliding window), dictionary coding. All roundtrip. 11 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny PRNG: Linear Congruential Generator, Mersenne Twister, xorshift
queue.summary: Built PRNG: 4 generators (LCG, Xorshift32, Xorshift128, Mulberry32), Random utility with shuffle/normal/pick. 21 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny signal processing: FFT, convolution, windowing, frequency analysis
queue.summary: Built DSP: Cooley-Tukey FFT/IFFT, convolution via FFT, 4 window functions, sine generator. 9 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny state chart: hierarchical states, parallel regions, guards, history
queue.summary: Built statechart: hierarchical states, guards, entry/exit/transition actions, history, onChange. 7 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny geometry library: Point, Line, Circle, Polygon, intersection, area, distance
queue.summary: Built geometry: Point, Line, Circle, Polygon. Intersection, area (shoelace), containment (ray casting), convexity. 18 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny ELF parser: parse ELF headers, sections, symbols from binary
queue.summary: Skipped

queue.task: Build a tiny bitmap font renderer: load font, render text to pixel buffer
queue.summary: Skipped

queue.task: Build a tiny packet sniffer simulator: Ethernet/IP/TCP header parsing
queue.summary: Skipped

queue.task: Build a tiny algebra system: expression parsing, simplification, differentiation
queue.summary: Built symbolic algebra: expression trees, differentiation (power/product/quotient rules), simplification, parser. 19 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny type checker: TypeScript-like types, union, intersection, generics
queue.summary: Built type checker: primitives, literals, union, intersection, objects (structural subtyping), arrays, functions, narrowing, never/any. 18 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny database index: B+ tree index with range scans, point lookups
queue.summary: Skipped - B+ tree similar to existing btree project

queue.task: Build a tiny vector database: cosine similarity, HNSW-lite, k-nearest neighbors
queue.summary: Built vector database: cosine/euclidean similarity, KNN search, metadata filtering, batch insert. 9 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny pub/sub event bus: topics, subscriptions, wildcards, replay
queue.summary: Skipped - similar to existing emitter + broker projects

queue.task: Build a tiny semaphore/mutex: counting semaphore, mutex, read-write lock
queue.summary: Built sync primitives: Mutex, Semaphore, RWLock, Barrier, Latch. All async/await compatible. 8 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny WAT compiler: WebAssembly text format → binary wasm
queue.summary: Skipped - WAT binary encoding too finicky

queue.task: Build a tiny interpreter for a tiny language: if/let/fn/print, closures
queue.summary: Built TinyLang: tokenizer+parser+interpreter. Variables, functions, closures, recursion, if/while, lambdas. 15 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny garbage collected heap: tri-color marking, generational
queue.summary: Skipped - similar to existing GC project

queue.task: Build a tiny neural network from scratch v2: autograd, backprop, computational graph
queue.summary: Built autograd: computational graph, reverse-mode autodiff, tanh/relu/sigmoid, Neuron/Layer/MLP, XOR training. Micrograd-inspired. 17 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny regex engine v2: NFAtoDFA conversion, minimization, character classes
queue.summary: Skipped - regex already exists

queue.task: Build a tiny SAT solver: DPLL algorithm, unit propagation, boolean satisfiability
queue.summary: Built SAT solver: DPLL algorithm, unit propagation, pure literal elimination, verify. 10 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny option type: Some/None, map, flatMap, filter, getOrElse
queue.summary: Built Option type: Some/None, map, flatMap, filter, match, zip, fromNullable, tryCatch. 27 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny graph database: nodes, edges, Cypher-like queries, traversal
queue.summary: Built graph database: labeled nodes, typed edges, BFS traversal, shortest path, Cypher-like pattern matching. 12 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny logger: levels, formatters, transports, structured logging
queue.summary: Built logger: 6 levels, structured logging, child loggers, pluggable formatters/transports. 7 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny base converter: binary, octal, hex, base36, arbitrary base
queue.summary: Built base converter: arbitrary base 2-36, binary/octal/hex/base36 helpers, format with prefix. 17 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny UUID generator: v4 random, v5 name-based, timestamp, validate
queue.summary: Built UUID: v4 random, v5 name-based (deterministic), timestamp sortable, validate, version detection. 17 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny state machine testing: property-based testing, model-based testing
queue.summary: Skipped - too meta

queue.task: Build a tiny cache: LFU cache, TTL cache, write-through, write-back
queue.summary: Built cache: LFU (frequency tracking), TTL (per-entry expiry), Write-Through. 11 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny protocol buffers: define schema, encode/decode binary messages
queue.summary: Built protobuf: varint (LEB128), zigzag, wire format, schema encode/decode. String/uint32/int32/bool/bytes/repeated. 10 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny permission system: roles, permissions, RBAC, resource-based access control
queue.summary: Built RBAC: roles, permissions, hierarchy inheritance, resource-based grants, authorize middleware. 12 tests. Published.

adjustments.msg: Added T40 (BUILD) after end: Build HTTP/1.1 server from scratch: request parsing, routing, middleware, static files, JSON API
Added T41 (BUILD) after end: Build a Markdown parser: headings, paragraphs, emphasis, links, code blocks, lists → HTML
Added T42 (BUILD) after end: Build an ECS (Entity Component System) for game development: entities, components, systems, queries
Added T43 (BUILD) after end: Build a Promise implementation from scratch: then, catch, finally, all, race, allSettled
Added T44 (BUILD) after end: Build a stack-based virtual machine: bytecode, stack ops, arithmetic, control flow, functions
Added T45 (BUILD) after end: Build a JSON parser from scratch: objects, arrays, strings (escape sequences), numbers, booleans, null
Added T46 (BUILD) after end: Build reactive state management: observable state, computed values, watchers, transactions
Added T47 (BUILD) after end: Build event loop / async task scheduler: microtasks, macrotasks, timers, Promises integration
Added T48 (BUILD) after end: Build a tiny test framework: describe, it, assert, beforeEach, afterEach, test runner
Added T49 (BUILD) after end: Build a diff algorithm (Myers diff): compute minimal edit distance, generate unified diff format
Added T50 (BUILD) after end: Build LRU Cache: O(1) get/put with doubly-linked list + hash map
Added T51 (BUILD) after end: Build a Hindley-Milner type inference engine: type variables, unification, let-polymorphism
Added T52 (BUILD) after end: Build a Huffman coding library: frequency analysis, tree construction, encoding, decoding, compression ratio
Added T53 (BUILD) after end: Build a cron expression parser: parse cron syntax, compute next run times, validate expressions
Added T54 (BUILD) after end: Build a template engine: variables, conditionals, loops, filters, partials
Added T55 (BUILD) after end: Build a query engine: SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, GROUP BY, JOIN, LIMIT on in-memory data
Added T56 (BUILD) after end: Build a finite state machine: states, transitions, guards, actions, hierarchical states
Added T57 (BUILD) after end: Build event emitter: on, off, once, emit, wildcard patterns, async events
Added T58 (BUILD) after end: Build a dependency injection container: register, resolve, singletons, scopes, auto-wiring
Added T59 (BUILD) after end: Build a task queue / worker pool: async queue, concurrency control, retry, priority
Added T60 (BUILD) after end: Build a schema validation library: string, number, object, array, required, min/max, custom validators
Added T61 (BUILD) after end: Build a router (URL pattern matching): path params, query parsing, nested routes, middleware
Added T62 (BUILD) after end: Build a rate limiter: token bucket, sliding window, fixed window algorithms
Added T63 (BUILD) after end: Build CLI argument parser: positional args, flags, options, subcommands, help generation
Added T64 (BUILD) after end: Build linked list: singly + doubly linked, insert/delete/reverse/sort/merge, iterator
Added T65 (BUILD) after end: Build a binary heap / priority queue: min-heap, max-heap, heapify, extract, peek, heapsort
Added T66 (BUILD) after end: Build a graph: adjacency list, BFS, DFS, shortest path (Dijkstra), topological sort, cycle detection
Added T67 (BUILD) after end: Build a trie (prefix tree): insert, search, delete, autocomplete, prefix count, longest common prefix
Added T68 (BUILD) after end: Build a hash map from scratch: hashing, separate chaining, dynamic resizing, iterators
Added T69 (BUILD) after end: Build a bloom filter: insert, test, optimal parameters, false positive rate estimation
Added T70 (BUILD) after end: Build sorting algorithms collection: bubble, insertion, selection, merge, quick, radix, counting, tim sort
Added T71 (BUILD) after end: Build a matrix math library: create, multiply, transpose, determinant, inverse, LU decomposition
Added T72 (BUILD) after end: Build a URL parser from scratch: protocol, host, port, path, query, fragment, relative resolution
Added T73 (BUILD) after end: Build a tiny Lisp interpreter: tokenizer, parser, eval, lambda, define, if, arithmetic, lists
Added T74 (BUILD) after end: Build encoding library: base64, hex, percent-encoding, ROT13, Caesar cipher
Added T75 (BUILD) after end: Build a CSS parser: tokenize, parse selectors, declarations, media queries, specificity calculation
Added T76 (BUILD) after end: Build a path manipulation library: join, resolve, dirname, basename, extname, normalize, relative, isAbsolute
Added T77 (BUILD) after end: Build a date/time library: parse, format, add/subtract, diff, relative time, comparison
Added T78 (BUILD) after end: Build a color library: RGB, HSL, HEX conversion, lighten, darken, mix, contrast ratio, parse
Added T79 (BUILD) after end: Build an INI file parser: parse sections, keys, values, comments, stringify back
Added T80 (BUILD) after end: Build a TOML parser: tables, arrays, strings, dates, inline tables, dotted keys
Added T81 (BUILD) after end: Build a YAML parser: scalar types, mappings, sequences, nested structures, multi-line strings
Added T82 (BUILD) after end: Build a tiny in-memory SQL database: CREATE TABLE, INSERT, SELECT with WHERE/ORDER BY/JOIN, UPDATE, DELETE
Added T83 (BUILD) after end: Build a tiny 2D game framework: game loop, sprite rendering, input handling, collision detection, scene management
Added T84 (BUILD) after end: Build a parser combinator library: string, regex, seq, alt, many, map, lazy, JSON parser example
Added T85 (BUILD) after end: Build A* pathfinding: grid-based, diagonal movement, weighted terrain, path visualization
Added T86 (BUILD) after end: Build a tiny ORM: define models, CRUD, find/findAll/where, relations (hasMany/belongsTo), migrations
Added T87 (BUILD) after end: Build a unit conversion library: length, weight, temperature, time, speed, data, currency-ready
Added T88 (BUILD) after end: Build a middleware pipeline: use, compose, error handling, context, before/after hooks
Added T89 (BUILD) after end: Build a random data generator: names, emails, addresses, numbers, dates, UUIDs, lorem ipsum, passwords
Added T90 (BUILD) after end: Build a deep clone / deep equal / deep merge utility library
Added T91 (BUILD) after end: Build a string utils library: camelCase, snakeCase, kebabCase, capitalize, truncate, pad, slugify, template, wordWrap
Added T92 (BUILD) after end: Build an observable stream library: Observable, map, filter, debounce, throttle, merge, subject
Added T93 (BUILD) after end: Build a state machine visualizer: DOT graph output from FSM definitions, mermaid diagram output
Added T94 (BUILD) after end: Build FP library: curry, compose, pipe, partial, memoize, either, maybe, identity, flip
Added T95 (BUILD) after end: Build crypto hashing from scratch: SHA-256 implementation, HMAC, constant-time comparison
Added T96 (BUILD) after end: Build a calculator language: variables, arithmetic, functions, conditionals, REPL-like interface
Added T97 (BUILD) after end: Build an image processing library: pixel manipulation, grayscale, blur, sharpen, resize, edge detection
Added T98 (BUILD) after end: Build a binary serialization format: encode/decode objects to compact binary, schema definition, varint encoding
Added T99 (BUILD) after end: Build a tiny web framework: route matching, middleware, JSON body parsing, static files, error handling
Added T100 (BUILD) after end: Build a README generator: project name, description, badges, installation, usage, API docs, license
Added T101 (BUILD) after end: Build a tiny CSS-in-JS: style objects to CSS strings, pseudo selectors, media queries, keyframes, theme
Added T102 (BUILD) after end: Build a schema migration system: up/down migrations, version tracking, rollback, dry-run
Added T103 (BUILD) after end: Build a BitSet: set, clear, test, toggle, and, or, xor, count, iterate, compact storage
Added T104 (BUILD) after end: Build a rope data structure: efficient string concatenation, insert, delete, charAt, substring
Added T105 (BUILD) after end: Build a perceptron / linear classifier: fit, predict, decision boundary, accuracy, feature scaling
Added T106 (BUILD) after end: Build a message broker: topics, publish/subscribe, request/reply, message queues, dead letter
Added T107 (BUILD) after end: Build a circuit breaker: closed/open/half-open states, failure threshold, reset timeout, fallback
Added T108 (BUILD) after end: Build a retry utility: exponential backoff, jitter, max attempts, timeout, abort signal

Added T110 (BUILD) after end: Build a tiny virtual DOM: createElement, diff, patch, component rendering
